title: Psychanthus scyphonemus
taxonomy: Psychanthus scyphonemus is a genus of flowering plants in the family Orchidaceae. The classification of Psychanthus scyphonemus places it within the subfamily Vanilloideae. This plant is endemic to Southeast Asia and is a part of the larger family of orchids. The classification is primarily based on morphological characteristics and genetic relationships. Further research may be needed to confirm its exact classification within the family Orchidaceae.
